nordvpn.name: NordVPN
nordvpn.description: NordVPN is a leading VPN service with 6,000+ servers in 111 countries. Known for its Double VPN and NordLynx protocol.

expressvpn.name: ExpressVPN
expressvpn.description: ExpressVPN offers high-speed servers in 105 countries. Its TrustedServer technology ensures no data is ever written to a hard drive.

surfshark.name: Surfshark
surfshark.description: Surfshark allows unlimited simultaneous connections and features a CleanWeb ad-blocker and MultiHop capabilities.

cyberghost.name: CyberGhost
cyberghost.description: CyberGhost has 9,000+ servers and specializes in optimized servers for streaming and secure P2P file sharing.

protonvpn.name: Proton VPN
protonvpn.description: Proton VPN is Swiss-based and security-focused, offering Secure Core architecture and open-source applications.

mullvad.name: Mullvad VPN
mullvad.description: Mullvad is a privacy-first VPN that requires no personal info and accepts cash payments for total anonymity.

private-internet-access.name: Private Internet Access
private-internet-access.description: PIA is a long-standing VPN with a proven no-logs policy in court and highly customizable security settings.

ipvanish.name: IPvanish
ipvanish.description: IPvanish provides high-speed connections and a user-friendly interface, ideal for Kodi and Fire Stick users.

windscribe.name: Windscribe
windscribe.description: Windscribe offers a generous free tier and unique features like R.O.B.E.R.T. for blocking trackers and ads.

hotspot-shield.name: Hotspot Shield
hotspot-shield.description: Hotspot Shield uses its proprietary Hydra protocol to deliver some of the fastest VPN speeds available.

vyprvpn.name: VyprVPN
vyprvpn.description: VyprVPN owns its entire server network and uses Chameleon protocol to bypass restricted networks in China.

strongvpn.name: StrongVPN
strongvpn.description: StrongVPN is a reliable choice for bypassing censorship and offers a free StrongDNS service with its subscription.

hidemyass.name: HMA (HideMyAss)
hidemyass.description: HMA has servers in almost every country in the world, making it the leader in geographic diversity.

tunnelbear.name: TunnelBear
tunnelbear.description: TunnelBear is known for its simple, approachable interface and commitment to transparency through annual security audits.

ivpn.name: IVPN
ivpn.description: IVPN is an ethical VPN service that focuses on extreme privacy and does not use any tracking on its website.

ovpn.name: OVPN
ovpn.description: OVPN uses RAM-only servers to ensure no logs can ever be stored on disk. Based in Sweden.

adguard-vpn.name: AdGuard VPN
adguard-vpn.description: AdGuard VPN uses a unique protocol that disguises VPN traffic as normal HTTPS traffic to avoid detection.

atlas-vpn.name: Atlas VPN
atlas-vpn.description: Atlas VPN is a freemium VPN service that offers Shield Design technology to block trackers and ads.

purevpn.name: PureVPN
purevpn.description: PureVPN features an always-on audit policy and a large network of 6,500+ servers globally.

hide-me.name: Hide.me
hide-me.description: Hide.me is highly praised for its advanced features like Bolt and Multihop, and a truly free tier.

torguard.name: TorGuard
torguard.description: TorGuard is built for power users, offering dedicated IPs and optimized servers for high-speed torrenting.

privatevpn.name: PrivateVPN
privatevpn.description: PrivateVPN is a Swedish provider that prioritizes quality over quantity with high-speed direct Tier-1 bandwidth.

trust-zone.name: Trust.Zone
trust-zone.description: Trust.Zone is a Seychelles-based VPN that focuses on simplicity and high anonymity for its users.

airvpn.name: AirVPN
airvpn.description: AirVPN is founded by activists and hacktivists in defense of net neutrality and privacy.

astrill.name: Astrill VPN
astrill.description: Astrill is a premium VPN favored by expats in China for its powerful stealth protocols and high speeds.

zenmate.name: ZenMate
zenmate.description: ZenMate offers an easy-to-use VPN with specialized servers for streaming and 1-click protection.

norton-secure-vpn.name: Norton Secure VPN
norton-secure-vpn.description: Included with Norton 360, this VPN provides bank-grade encryption and ad-tracking prevention.

bitdefender-vpn.name: Bitdefender VPN
bitdefender-vpn.description: A lightweight VPN from the cybersecurity leader, offering fast speeds and ultra-secure browsing.

f-secure-freedome.name: F-Secure Freedome
f-secure-freedome.description: Freedome is a simple, effective VPN from Finland that protects against tracking and malicious sites.

ghostpath.name: GhostPath
ghostpath.description: GhostPath provides a simple VPN solution with a focus on ease of use and solid privacy protection.

goose-vpn.name: Goose VPN
goose-vpn.description: Goose VPN is a Dutch provider that offers a user-friendly experience and unlimited device connections.

ironsocket.name: Ironsocket
ironsocket.description: Ironsocket offers VPN, HTTP Proxy, and DNS Proxy services to bypass censorship and secure connections.

le-vpn.name: Le VPN
le-vpn.description: Le VPN provides a HybridVPN service that combines VPN security with SmartDNS speed.

liquidvpn.name: LiquidVPN
liquidvpn.description: LiquidVPN features unique 'Modulating IPs' that change continuously for maximum anonymity.

namecheap-fastvpn.name: Namecheap FastVPN
namecheap-fastvpn.description: A high-speed VPN from the famous domain registrar, offering unlimited bandwidth and device support.

pandavpn.name: PandaVPN
pandavpn.description: PandaVPN is a fast-growing provider with a focus on ease of use and optimized streaming routes.

perfect-privacy.name: Perfect Privacy
perfect-privacy.description: Perfect Privacy is for experts, offering advanced features like NeuroRouting and multi-hop cascades.

safervpn.name: SaferVPN
safervpn.description: SaferVPN offers 1-click privacy and is highly effective at unblocking global content libraries.

slickvpn.name: SlickVPN
slickvpn.description: SlickVPN provides secure connections with HYDRA tech to maximize routing efficiency and privacy.

speedify.name: Speedify
speedify.description: Speedify uses channel bonding to combine multiple internet connections for faster, more reliable VPN performance.

spyoff.name: SpyOFF
spyoff.description: SpyOFF is a German-based VPN that focuses on total anonymity and unrestricted internet access.

surfeasy.name: SurfEasy
surfeasy.description: SurfEasy is a simple VPN integrated into Opera browser and available as a standalone app for privacy.

totalvpn.name: TotalVPN
totalvpn.description: TotalVPN offers a simple, all-in-one privacy solution with a focus on unblocking and secure browsing.

unlocator.name: Unlocator
unlocator.description: Unlocator combines SmartDNS and VPN technology to help users unblock streaming services worldwide.

vpnarea.name: VPNArea
vpnarea.description: VPNArea is a Bulgarian provider known for its high-speed servers and commitment to user privacy.

vpn-ac.name: VPN.ac
vpn-ac.description: VPN.ac is operated by security professionals and features advanced security protocols and high encryption.

vpn-unlimited.name: VPN Unlimited
vpn-unlimited.description: VPN Unlimited offers lifetime subscriptions and specialized servers for streaming and torrenting.

wevpn.name: WeVPN
wevpn.description: WeVPN is a newer provider that has quickly gained popularity for its high speeds and unblocking abilities.

zoogvpn.name: ZoogVPN
zoogvpn.description: ZoogVPN offers a simple, effective VPN with a focus on unblocking Netflix and other streaming sites.

cactusvpn.name: CactusVPN
cactusvpn.description: CactusVPN offers VPN and SmartDNS services with a focus on unblocking streaming media.

trustvpn.name: TrustVPN
trustvpn.description: TrustVPN provides reliable privacy protection and a focus on bypassing geo-restrictions safely.
